rationale: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue as before — no qualitative change affecting Poland's security or energy situation; EU-Ukraine talks advancing but already in background.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue; Trump says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: Ongoing Israeli attacks on Hezbollah in Beirut keep Middle East tensions elevated, with indirect risk to energy prices. No new escalation beyond established baseline.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU formally advancing Ukraine accession talks is a continuation of the known process — no qualitative leap for Poland's eastern policy or refugee situation.

top_events.title: UK seizes suspected Russian oil tanker funding Ukraine war
top_events.summary: UK forces intercepting a Russian shadow-fleet tanker signals tightening pressure on Russian energy revenues — minor positive signal for Poland's security posture but no direct impact.
